pages.title: Lost
pages.text: Simple: You're Nowhere. No I don't mean lost in a standard sense, you are quite literally Nowhere, a place sometimes titled as "The Plane of the Lost". It is a dry, nearly lifeless world stalked by undead. How did we get here? No idea, you could have come here willingly, or just happened to be (un)lucky to appear here. I recommend you find some trees to punch down.
